tagline: AI-Powered App Building for Non-Technical Founders

targetAudience.experienceLevel: Absolute beginners with no programming background

productTiers.name: Builder
productTiers.description: Weekly 30-min async coaching via Loom videos, private Discord community access, monthly group Q&A call, and AI prompt templates library. Best for beginners testing ideas.

productTiers.name: Founder
productTiers.description: Bi-weekly 1:1 strategy calls (30 min), priority Discord support (24-48hr response), custom prompt engineering, access to templates and case study library, monthly group mastermind. Best for active builders launching products.

productTiers.name: Accelerator
productTiers.description: Weekly 1:1 calls (45 min), hands-on live coding sessions (2x/month), white-glove prompt customization, direct Slack access, pre-launch review and feedback. Best for solopreneurs ready to scale.

leadMagnet.name: 7-Day AI App Blueprint
leadMagnet.description: Email course with day-by-day walkthrough of building your first app with AI tools, plus downloadable tool comparison chart (Lovable vs Cursor vs Bolt). Low-friction entry point to our community.
